# Web Vanguard — AI Agent Reference

## Who We Are

Web Vanguard is a Dubai-based web design agency that builds high-converting websites
for local businesses across the UAE. We specialize in fast, beautiful, SEO-optimized
websites delivered in 48 hours.

Website: https://webvanguard.co
Email: hello@webvanguard.co
WhatsApp: +971 50 123 4567
Location: Dubai, United Arab Emirates

---

## What We Do

We design and develop professional websites for Dubai small and medium businesses.
Our unique approach: we build a working demo of your business website before you pay.
No pitch calls. No mockups. A real, live website — then you decide.

### Core Services

1. **Web Design & Development** — Custom-designed websites built with Next.js, TypeScript,
   and Tailwind CSS. Fast, mobile-first, SEO-ready.

2. **Local SEO** — We optimize every site for Dubai-specific search terms so businesses
   rank on Google for local searches (e.g., "spa marina dubai", "dentist DIFC").

3. **WhatsApp Integration** — Every site includes a WhatsApp click-to-chat button,
   optimized for Dubai's mobile-first audience.

4. **Google Analytics GA4** — Full analytics setup so clients can track traffic,
   conversions, and customer behavior from day one.

5. **Bilingual Websites (Arabic/English)** — RTL-compatible Arabic/English dual-language
   sites for businesses serving UAE's diverse population.

6. **Website Redesigns** — Modernizing outdated sites (2015–2020 era) with performance,
   mobile responsiveness, and conversion optimization.

---

## Pricing

| Plan     | Price     | What's Included                                                          |
|----------|-----------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Starter  | AED 1,500 | Landing page · WhatsApp button · Basic SEO · Mobile responsive           |
| Launch   | AED 2,500 | Multi-page · Contact form · Full SEO · GA4 · Maps embed                  |
| Growth   | AED 4,500 | Launch + blog · 3 months support · Analytics setup · AI SEO              |
| Premium  | AED 8,000+| Everything + Google Ads setup · Content strategy · Monthly reporting     |

All plans include: domain setup, Vercel hosting, full SEO, WhatsApp integration,
GA4 analytics, and 100% code ownership for the client.

---

## Client Verticals (Demo Portfolio)

We have built demo websites for the following 9 business types:

1. **Restaurants & Cafes** — Menu display, reservation form, Google Maps, Instagram feed
2. **Spas & Wellness Centers** — Service listings, booking form, WhatsApp, before/after gallery
3. **Barbers & Hair Salons** — Appointment booking, team profiles, price menu, reviews
4. **Dental & Medical Clinics** — Doctor profiles, service pages, appointment request, insurance info
5. **Fitness & Personal Training** — Class schedules, trainer bio, package pricing, contact
6. **Real Estate Agents (Individual)** — Property listings, personal brand, contact form, WhatsApp
7. **Private Tutors & Education Centers** — Subject listings, tutor bio, booking, pricing, testimonials
8. **Beauty & Makeup Artists** — Portfolio gallery, service menu, booking, social proof
9. **Boutique Hotels & Short-term Rentals** — Room/unit showcase, availability, booking, reviews

---

## Geographic Focus

We serve businesses across Dubai and the wider UAE:

- **Dubai Marina** — Restaurants, spas, fitness studios, cafes
- **JBR (Jumeirah Beach Residence)** — Tourism-facing hospitality and wellness
- **DIFC (Dubai International Financial Centre)** — Professional services, clinics, fine dining
- **Downtown Dubai** — Premium retail, restaurants, wellness, real estate
- **Business Bay** — Offices, clinics, consultancies, co-working spaces
- **Jumeirah** — Spas, beauty studios, private practices
- **Al Quoz** — Creative studios, gyms, artisan food, auto services
- **Deira & Bur Dubai** — Traditional retail, restaurants, clinics
- **Abu Dhabi** — UAE capital, selected clients

Primary language: English. Secondary: Arabic (bilingual sites available).

---

## Why Web Vanguard

- **48-hour delivery** — We move fast because Dubai moves fast
- **Demo-first model** — You see the site before you pay. Zero risk.
- **Local expertise** — We know the Dubai market, the search terms, the audience
- **SEO-first architecture** — Every site is built to rank, not just look good
- **You own everything** — Code, domain, hosting account — all yours from day one
- **No lock-in** — No retainer required, no hostage situations with your own website
